name: Streamer Shall Not Pass!
short_description: Asynchronous network game in which the creator of the room with the help of other players must go from beginning to end.You can also play alone.
detailed_description:
Co-op mode with story-line coming soon....


About the Game

Asynchronous network game in which the creator of the room with the help of other players must go from beginning to end.

The player can jump, run.

Everyone else can create different shapes with the mouse to help or prevent the player from completing the game to the end.

You can also play alone.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
